title: Miss Doublefinger Presses In
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on miss doublefinger presses in, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Miss Doublefinger Presses In. Nami is pushed into a dangerous fight where every mistake with the Clima-Tact could kill her. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You cut it, didn't you? With that arm of yours...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The following is the most important thing I have ever seen in the past few years.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That's one hell of a body you've got there...

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've eaten the "Supa Supa" fruit,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Making me into a human blade,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You must be the one,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: ...Back a few years ago in East Blue,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There was a pirate-hutter who rejected Baroque Works's invitation,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And killed Mr. 7...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That must've been you as well.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Hearing that sure does take me back...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: But you know, it was your organi- zation that was at fault for rejecting my conditions...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I made myself clear to your agent.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll join only if I get to be the boss.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Fufufu!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What a fool!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Instead of accepting my offer, that idiot tried to kill me, so I had no choice but to off him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So have you come to try to persuade me as well?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Though I have to say, after hearing what a farce your organization is, I'd reject the offer even if I were allowed to become the boss.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ooh-

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: A swordsman on a small- time pirate crew like you,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Thinks he can make a fool out of me...?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: And what if I am...? What does that make you!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: A puppet without a will of its own, strung along by that false bait called "Utopia"...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Or a mindless tin soldier who can only follow orders...?

summary: This part develops miss doublefinger presses in and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
